narrative:
Granville Twp township has 2,877 registered voters, with 46.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 4.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 44.2 percentage points.
